name: Dolia

skills.name: Mermaid's Gift
skills.description: Dolia takes on mermaid form when in water (rivers are also considered water), reducing the slows taken by 50% and returning life and mana every second. The mermaid form's Basic Attacks will shoot water arrows for ranged damage. Dolia's [Recovery] is replaced with [Mermaid's Gift], which allows her to create a pact with a selected teammate, and prioritizes her pacted teammate when using [Celestial Melody].

skills.name: Ode
skills.description: Dolia chants 4 sound waves that spread outward, the first 3 dealing spell damage and 10% slow. The 4th deals more spell damage and 50% slow for 1 second. The sound waves also echo when they hit an enemy, dealing spell damage to those they touch and, if released in water, sending waves of water knocking back nearby enemies (knockback of enemies around you has a stun effect). Non-heroic units provoke a much smaller echo, dealing only 50% of the damage.

skills.name: Wavemaker
skills.description: Lam enters “Submerged” state, greatly increasing his Movement Speed for 3 seconds. When the duration ends, Lam leaps out of the water, immediately restoring 50% of this skill’s cooldown. While in Submerged state, casting the skill again will cause Lam to surface early, dealing 300 (+120% Bonus Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies and slowing their Movement Speed by 50% for 1.5 seconds. Passive: While in river terrain, the Submerged state has no time limit. If an enemy hero with below 30% Health appears within 1500 range, Lam gains 450 Movement Speed.

skills.name: Celestial Melody
skills.description: After Dolia briefly chants, refresh the skill with the longest current cooldown of a friendly within range, taking more cooldown from yourself. If a teammate's skill is not used after being refreshed, [Celestial Melody]'s cooldown recovery speed can be accelerated by 20/30/40%. Teammates do not consume Mana or Energy when using the skill for 5 seconds after the skill is refreshed, and the beatdown benefit caused by the skill is split equally with Dolia. Refreshing skills for contracted teammates is prioritized, followed by non-contracted teammates, or refreshing your own skills if there are no teammates nearby. Failure to refresh a skill returns most of the cooldown of [Celestial Melody].

tips: Dolia is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 46.1% win rate and 1.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of the Arcane → Dawnlight → Venomous Staff → Sage's Sanctuary → Succubus Cloak.
Run Fate for stats that match Dolia's Support kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Ode → Wavemaker → Celestial Melody → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
Teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
Dolia excels into Dun, Yaria. Avoid blind picking into Sima Yi, Guiguzi without team peel.

Dolia is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 0.5% — expect Dolia to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: Is Dolia good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Dolia is Tier S Support with 46.1% win rate, 1.8% pick rate, and 0.5% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Dolia build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of the Arcane, Dawnlight, Venomous Staff, Sage's Sanctuary, Succubus Cloak. Run Fate arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Dolia?
faqs.answer: Pick Sima Yi, Guiguzi into Dolia. Deny Roaming resources early and force fights before Dolia completes core items. Dolia struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Dolia counter?
faqs.answer: Dolia is strong into Dun, Yaria according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Dolia when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Roaming lane.

faqs.question: Is Dolia good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Dolia is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 0.5% — expect Dolia to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: What lane should Dolia play?
faqs.answer: Dolia is tagged Roaming in Camp export (Support). Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Dolia?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Dolia or Cai Yan — which is better?
faqs.answer: Dolia vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Cai Yan wins 4.3% more often globally. Choose Dolia when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Dolia?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 0.5% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Support.
